allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('$\(pwd\)/client/node_modules/typescript'\); const cfg = ts.readConfigFile\('$\(pwd\)/client/tsconfig.json', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(cfg.config, ts.sys, '$\(pwd\)/client'\); const program = ts.createProgram\(parsed.fileNames, parsed.options\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(program\); diags.forEach\(d => { const file = d.file ? d.file.fileName + ':' + d.file.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start\).line : 'unknown'; console.log\(file + ' - ' + ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, '\\n'\)\); }\); console.log\('Total errors:', diags.length\);")
